title: NoobFriendly
description: A new-player friendly modpacks, for new people to be introduced to mods.
body:
![TITLE/LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7be00443022eb9003ad8926b25ff67639f5b03eb.png)


## Intro
A modpack equipped with simple mods perfect to introduce new player to a modded Minecraft maintaining the vanilla essence of Minecraft including QOL mods like Trade Cycling or Xaero's minimap.  


Feel free to check the mods, resource pack and sharders tabs to be fully informated and activate or deactivate certain mod to your liking :)).


## Mods
⭐-> Favourites  
🔄️-> Optional (can affect slightly the vanilla experience)
<details>
<summary>QOL Mods included:</summary>
  
- **Animatica**: A client-side mod that adds support for animated textures in resource packs, similar to OptiFine's format.
- **Bobby**: Allows you to see chunks beyond the server's render distance by storing them locally.
- **Capes**: Enables the use of capes from various cape mods like OptiFine and LabyMod.
- **Chat Heads**: Displays player heads next to their messages in chat for easier identification.
- **Clean F3**: A client-side mod that declutters the debug screen by removing unnecessary information.
- **Continuity**: A mod that allows for connected textures, similar to OptiFine, for a more seamless visual experience.
- **Controlling**: Adds a search bar and other helpful features to the key-bindings menu to make managing controls easier.
- **Cut Through**: A client-side utility mod that allows you to interact with blocks through other entities.
- ⭐ **Debugify**: A client-side mod that fixes a wide variety of bugs present in the vanilla game.
- **Entity Model Features**: A client-side mod that adds support for custom entity models in resource packs.
- **Entity Texture Features**: Enables emissive, random, and custom textures for entities through resource packs.
- **Euphoria Patches**: An add-on for Complementary Shaders that provides a wide variety of optional visual tweaks and features for advanced customization.
- ⭐ **Jade**: Displays a tooltip with information about the block or entity the player is looking at.
- ⭐ **LambDynamicLights**: Adds dynamic lighting to entities and items held by the player, making them emit light.
- **Language Reload**: Allows for faster reloading of the game's language files without needing to restart.
- **Main Menu Credits**: A simple mod that adds a configurable list of credits to the main menu screen.
- **MidnightControls**: Adds controller support to Minecraft, allowing for gameplay with a gamepad.
- **Mod Menu**: Adds a menu to the game that lists all installed mods and allows for in-game configuration.
- **Model Gap Fix**: Fixes visual gaps that can appear between blocks in some resource packs.
- **Mouse Tweaks**: Adds various tweaks to mouse controls in the inventory, such as improved dragging and scrolling.
- **No Chat Reports**: A client-side mod that disables the chat reporting feature added in Minecraft 1.19.
- **Pick Up Notifier**: Displays a notification on the screen when you pick up an item.
- **Ping Wheel**: Adds a pinging system to the game, allowing players to easily communicate locations and points of interest.
- **Remove Reloading Screen**: Removes the reloading screen that appears when changing resource packs or settings.
- **Resourcify**: A mod that allows players to download and apply resource packs directly from within the game.
- 🔄️ **Trade Cycling**: Allows you to cycle through a villager's trades by scrolling the mouse wheel.
- ⭐ **World Host**: A client-side mod that allows you to host your single-player worlds for friends to join over the internet, without any server setup or port forwarding. **Allow offline players to join you**
- ⭐🔄️ **Xaero's Minimap**: Adds a highly customizable minimap to the game, showing nearby terrain, entities, and waypoints.
- ⭐ **Zoomify**: A client-side mod that adds a highly configurable zoom key, allowing you to zoom in on distant objects.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Optimization mods</summary>

- **Clumps**: Reduces lag by grouping experience orbs together into a single entity.
- **Enhanced Block Entities**: Optimizes the rendering of block entities like chests and signs to improve performance.
- **EntityCulling**: Prevents the rendering of entities that are not visible to the player to improve performance.
- **FastQuit**: Improves the speed of quitting the game by making the saving process asynchronous.
- **FerriteCore**: Optimizes memory usage by reducing the amount of RAM Minecraft needs to run.
- **ImmediatelyFast**: An all-in-one performance mod that applies various optimizations to the rendering engine and other game logic to significantly boost FPS.
- ⭐ **Iris**: A modern shaders mod for Minecraft that is compatible with Sodium and provides a significant performance boost.
- **Lithium**: A general-purpose performance mod that optimizes many of Minecraft's game systems, such as mob AI, physics, and block ticking, without changing vanilla behavior.
- **ModernFix**: A performance-enhancing mod that improves launch times and reduces memory usage.
- ⭐ **Nvidium**: A performance mod specifically for NVIDIA graphics cards that aims to improve rendering performance. **NEEDS NVIDIA GPU, if not, it deactivates automatically**
- ⭐ **Sodium**: A performance optimization mod that significantly improves frame rates and reduces stutter by optimizing the rendering engine.
- **Sodium Extra**: Adds extra graphical options and settings to the Sodium mod for further customization.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Libraries/APIs</summary>


- **Cloth Config v17**: A configuration screen API library for developers to create in-game settings menus for their mods.
- **Fabric API**: A core library of essential hooks and tools for Fabric mods, ensuring compatibility and interoperability.
- **Fabric Language Kotlin**: Adds support for the Kotlin programming language within the Fabric modding environment.
- **Forge Config API Port**: A port of Forge's configuration API for Fabric, allowing for easier configuration of mods.
- **MidnightLib**: A library mod required by other mods from the same creator, providing shared code and functionality.
- **Placeholder API**: A library for developers that provides a standardized way to use placeholders in text.
- **Puzzles Lib**: A library mod that provides shared code and functionality for other mods by the same author.
- **Searchables**: A library mod for developers that adds searchable and filterable components to the game.
- **Yeetus Experimentus**: A utility mod that provides experimental features and tools for developers and advanced users.
- **YetAnotherConfigLib**: A library that provides a powerful and easy-to-use configuration screen API for developers.

</details>

## Resource Packs

<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

- **Default-Dark-Mode**: A resource pack that provides a dark theme for all of Minecraft's user interfaces.
- **FreshAnimations**: This pack revamps the animations of entities in the game, giving them a more dynamic and realistic look.
- **Low Shield**: A simple pack that lowers the shield on the screen to take up less space, especially when not in use.
- **LowOnFire**: This pack lowers the fire animation on the screen when you are burning, allowing for better visibility.
- 🔄️ **NewGlowingOres [Border]**: Makes ores glow in the dark to make them easier to spot, with a distinct border around them.
- **SodiumTranslations**: A community-driven project that provides and maintains translations for the Sodium mod.

</details>

## Shader packs

<details>
<summary>Shader packs</summary>

- Bliss (Chocapic13 Shaders edit)
- ⭐ Complementary Reimagined **MID-DEMANDING**
- Rethinking voxels **DEMANDING**
- Shrimple
- ⭐ SuperDuperVanilla **LIGHT**

</details>
